siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 4 by 8 at 40 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 30 minutes: 1x 500m Run, 2 Rope Climbs, 3 Wall Walk, 4 Thruster 50/35, 5 C2B. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, hamstrings, core stability.
